name: Victory Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, cocoa, baking soda and salt; set aside.
2. Cream the shortening and sugar in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy using an electric mixer at medium speed.
3. Blend in the corn syrup and egg yolks. Beat in vanilla extract.
4. Add dry ingredients alternately with coffee to the creamed mixture, beating well after each addition.
5. Beat egg whites in another bowl until stiff peaks form.
6. Fold egg whites into cake batter.
7. Pour batter into a greased 13 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
8. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes or until the cake tests done.
9. Cool in pan on rack.
